title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FreshToHome - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FreshToHome - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, FreshToHome in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FreshToHome:
FreshToHome is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreshToHome!
